label: Intervention Classes
description: High-level intervention taxonomy for structuring recommendations and executable actions.
usageNotes: Use high-level classes only; product-specific detail belongs in terminology mappings or downstream resource catalogs.
One EO action should have one primary intervention class.

entries.label: Drug
entries.description: Pharmacologic intervention delivered as medication or biologic therapy.
usageNotes: Map formulary or RxNorm detail downstream.

entries.label: Device
usageNotes: Use for device selection when the device itself is the intervention.

entries.label: Surgery
entries.description: Surgical intervention at the highest procedural level.
usageNotes: Use when open/minimally invasive subtype is not the key distinction.

entries.label: Minimally Invasive Procedure
entries.description: Procedure delivered through minimally invasive operative access.
usageNotes: Includes laparoscopic or thoracoscopic strategies when access is relevant.

entries.label: Open Procedure
usageNotes: Use when open approach itself changes risk or selection.

entries.label: Endovascular Procedure
usageNotes: Common in vascular and structural heart workflows.

entries.label: ICU Strategy
entries.description: Management strategy intended primarily for ICU settings.
usageNotes: Use for sedation, hemodynamics or critical care bundles.

entries.label: Ventilation Strategy
entries.description: Mechanical ventilation or respiratory support strategy.
usageNotes: Includes liberation and protective ventilation protocols.

entries.label: Analgesia Strategy
entries.description: Pain management strategy including multimodal protocols.
usageNotes: Use for perioperative and postoperative analgesia bundles.

entries.label: Nutrition Strategy
entries.description: Enteral, parenteral or oral nutrition management strategy.
usageNotes: Use for ERAS feeding and critical care nutrition pathways.

entries.label: Rehabilitation Strategy
entries.description: Structured rehabilitation, conditioning or recovery intervention.
usageNotes: Use when the intervention is a planned rehab program.

entries.label: Diagnostic Test
entries.description: Laboratory or functional test used to diagnose or exclude disease.
usageNotes: Use when imaging is not the primary modality.

entries.label: Imaging Test
usageNotes: Use for CT, MRI, echo and similar modalities.

entries.label: Biomarker Panel
entries.description: Single biomarker or multi-marker analytic panel.
usageNotes: Use when assay composition matters clinically.

entries.label: Workflow Rule
entries.description: Operational workflow rule, sequencing rule or gating condition.
usageNotes: Common for pathways, checklists and order-set gating.

entries.label: Care Bundle
usageNotes: Use when the bundle is the recommended unit, not a single action.

entries.label: Monitoring Strategy
entries.description: Structured monitoring or surveillance strategy over time.
usageNotes: Use for telemetry, lab cadence, home monitoring or follow-up surveillance.
